## What / why

<!-- One paragraph: what changed, and why does that need to change? -->

## Which package(s)?

<!-- Tick every affected package. -->

- [ ] `@exortek/crypto`
- [ ] `@exortek/security`
- [ ] `@exortek/otp`
- [ ] `@exortek/password`
- [ ] `@exortek/session`
- [ ] `@exortek/jwk`
- [ ] `@exortek/jws`

- [ ] `@exortek/apikey`
- [ ] Repo tooling (build, CI, docs site, lint/format)
- [ ] Docs only (no source code changed)

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change that adds behaviour)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (existing behaviour changes — requires a major bump)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor / lint / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn verify` passes locally (typecheck + lint + format:check + test)
- [ ] Tests added / updated for the change
- [ ] Docs updated (README + `web/content/…` where relevant)
- [ ] Changeset added (`yarn changeset`) — required for any `packages/*` runtime change
- [ ] Public API changes carry updated JSDoc (`.d.ts` is generated from JSDoc)
